examples: The readiness of the rats to befriend the social robot was surprising given its minimal design.
Not only does Splat befriend every cat in his class, he even converts them to a mouse-free diet.
If Hiccup was going to take a risk and befriend a dragon, it had to be the most frightening dragon in the world.
Make a beeline for reception, Nossel recommends, and befriend the person at the desk.
Nevertheless, the researchers wrote, the findings reveal that tend-and-befriend is not exclusive to women.
